'''Reggi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] with whom [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] tried to negotiate in order to hire the [[Soskin Guard]] to protect his mining shipments from [[Varn]]. Reggi requested 50,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] a month for the Guard to work for Calrissian, a payment Lando refused.

==Appearances==
